title: COVID-19 State, Tribal, Local, and Territorial Funding | Budget | CDC
text:
ropriations Act, 2021 and $1.86 billion from the American Rescue Plan Act of 2021. 
Where funding has been provided directly to a sub-level jurisdiction, it is noted separately. 
Includes funding from the Coronavirus Aid, Relief, and Economic Security Act and the American Rescue Plan Act of 2021. 
These award totals include some CDC base public health infrastructure and capacity funding in addition to American Rescue Plan Act of 2021 workforce funds. 
For additional information about individual awards, please visit:
